final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing technical exploded-view diagram of a Sony A7 camera, intended for educational reference or product documentation.

Style/medium: technical exploded-view diagram, product illustration with labeled callouts
Composition: exploded isometric or perspective view showing all components separated along axis lines, with numbered callouts pointing to each part
Subject: Sony A7 camera decomposed into all constituent parts: body shell, sensor assembly, shutter mechanism, mirrorless mount, EVF (electronic viewfinder), LCD screen assembly, battery compartment, SD card slot, control dials, buttons, grip, hot shoe, lens mount ring, image stabilization unit, main circuit board, battery, and all internal mechanical components
Scene/backdrop: clean neutral background (white or light gray), typical of technical documentation
Lighting/mood: even, shadowless technical lighting for clarity
Color palette: neutral grays and blacks for camera body, metallic accents for mechanical parts, color-coded callout lines
Materials/textures: brushed metal, matte plastic, glass elements, rubber grip texture
Text (verbatim): Sony A7, all part names labeled in Spanish ("sensor", "montura E", "obturador", "pantalla LCD", "visor electrónico", "estabilizador de imagen", etc.)
Constraints: all major components must be visible and labeled, exploded spacing must clearly show relationships between parts, professional technical illustration style
Avoid: cluttered overlapping, missing key components, photorealistic rendering (keep it diagrammatic), decorative elements
